# External Documentation (For End Users)

This directory contains user-facing documentation for people using the Flow Kanban application.

## 📁 Contents

### Getting Started
- **[INSTALLATION_GUIDE.md](INSTALLATION_GUIDE.md)** - Complete installation instructions for macOS
- **[MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md](MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md)** - Fix for macOS security warnings

## 🚀 Quick Start

### New Users
1. **Install Flow**: Follow [INSTALLATION_GUIDE.md](INSTALLATION_GUIDE.md)
2. **First Run Issues?**: See [MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md](MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md)
3. **Learn the Basics**: See main [README.md](../../README.md#-quick-start-users)

### Troubleshooting
- **App won't open**: [MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md](MACOS_QUARANTINE_FIX.md)
- **Other issues**: Check [main README troubleshooting section](../../README.md#-troubleshooting)

## 📚 Related Documentation

- **Developer Documentation**: See [../internal/](../internal/) for technical guides
- **Project Overview**: See [../../README.md](../../README.md) for features and roadmap

## 🆘 Need Help?

1. Check the documentation in this folder
2. Review the [main README](../../README.md)
3. Search existing [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO/issues)
4. Create a new issue if your problem isn't covered

---

**For Developers**: If you're looking to contribute or modify Flow, see the [internal documentation](../internal/).
